rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

Magical Prayer to Cause the Drowning of Demons

Magical Prayer to Make It Impossible for Other Men to Approach One's Woman

Magical Prayer for Gaining Love and Respect from Kings and Officials and People Everywhere
Magical Prayer for Protection of Property
Magical Prayer Using Archangel Michael's Magical Names (Asmat)

Anqäs Concerning the Coming of Sickness and Death
